COMMENT: Codes represent FIPS state codes or outlying areas under U.S. sovereignty (e.g., Puerto Rico, U.S. 
Virgin Islands, Guam) with the exception of “93,” “94,” and “97,” representing non-Medicaid entities 
from states that submit CHIP or TPA separately from Medicaid.
